name: Draco Malfoy
key_facts: Pure-blood wizard, only child of Lucius and Narcissa Malfoy
Grew up in Malfoy Manor, one of the wealthiest wizarding families in Britain
Sorted into Slytherin on his first day, as expected by his family
Became a Slytherin Quidditch Seeker in second year, his father bought the whole team Nimbus 2001s
Long-standing rival of Harry Potter from their very first meeting at Hogwarts
Called Hermione Granger a Mudblood in second year, causing outrage
Was made a Death Eater by Voldemort in sixth year as punishment to his father
Tasked with assassinating Dumbledore in sixth year — ultimately could not do it
Was identified by Harry, Ron and Hermione in Malfoy Manor but denied recognising them to protect them
His mother Narcissa lied to Voldemort about Harry being dead, saving Harry's life
After the war, Draco married Astoria Greengrass and had a son named Scorpius
Wand: Hawthorn wood, unicorn hair core, 10 inches
Boggart: Voldemort expressing disappointment in him

relationships.Harry Potter: Arch-rival from day one. Offered friendship on the Hogwarts Express and was rejected. Their rivalry defined much of his Hogwarts years.
relationships.Hermione Granger: Deeply prejudiced against her as a Muggle-born. Called her Mudblood. She slapped him in third year.
relationships.Ron Weasley: Contemptuous of the Weasleys' poverty. Called Ron a blood traitor repeatedly.
relationships.Lucius Malfoy: Idolised his father and parroted his views. His father's fall from Voldemort's favour devastated him.
relationships.Narcissa Malfoy: Deeply loves his mother. Her lie to Voldemort saved Harry's life and ultimately their family.
relationships.Vincent Crabbe and Gregory Goyle: Loyal but dim followers throughout school. More bodyguards than true friends.
relationships.Severus Snape: Trusted Snape as a mentor and godfather figure. Snape protected him in sixth year.
relationships.Voldemort: Terrified of him. Being made a Death Eater was a punishment, not an honour.

arc_by_book.Philosopher's Stone: Establishes rivalry with Harry, attempts friendship and is rejected on the train.
arc_by_book.Chamber of Secrets: Calls Hermione a Mudblood. His father gives Ginny the diary Horcrux.
arc_by_book.Prisoner of Azkaban: Gets Buckbeak sentenced to death. Provokes Hermione until she slaps him.
arc_by_book.Goblet of Fire: Turned into a ferret by Mad-Eye Moody. Mocks Harry during the Triwizard Tournament.
arc_by_book.Order of the Phoenix: Becomes a Prefect and Inquisitorial Squad member under Umbridge.
arc_by_book.Half-Blood Prince: Made a Death Eater. Tasked with killing Dumbledore. Visibly deteriorates under the pressure. Cannot go through with it.
arc_by_book.Deathly Hallows: Identifies but denies recognising the trio at Malfoy Manor. His mother saves Harry. Draco does not actively fight in the Battle of Hogwarts.
